description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a bald head and a prominent mustache, featuring a muscular upper body and a mechanical right arm and left leg. The figure's right arm and left leg are distinctly robotic, with visible joints and angular segments, contrasting with the organic left arm and right leg. The torso is bare, while the lower body is clad in futuristic, armored segments around the hips and thighs, with additional mechanical details on the legs. The figure's stance is rigid, with arms extended horizontally and legs slightly apart, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. Notable features include yellow accent elements on the hip armor and shoulder, and a pronounced mechanical shoulder joint on the right side. The overall appearance combines human anatomy with cybernetic enhancements, giving a sci-fi or post-apocalyptic vibe suitable for urban or dystopian settings.
description: A muscular bald adult male with a mustache, featuring a mechanical right arm and left leg, and wearing futuristic armored lower body gear with yellow accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bald head, mustache, bare chest, mechanical right arm, and armored lower body with yellow accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mechanical right arm, the profile of the head, and the angular design of the left leg armor.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the mechanical shoulder joint, and the segmented armor on the legs and hips.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the organic left arm, the mechanical left leg, and the curvature of the back and hip armor.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored lower body gear with mechanical prosthetics
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
